wilcoxon_pairwise_matrix.limitation: With only 10 paired observations, Wilcoxon may have low power.

ols_regression.limitation: Only 10 observations with 2 predictors. Results are exploratory.

criterion_2_interactions.note: F1=1.0 on friedman1 and friedman3, lower on 3-way and 4-way interactions
